params.name: Golden Leaf Award
params.description: The trophy awarded for the highest prize of the Cennes International Film Festival is a Golden Leaf Award. The crystal trophy base weighs 1 kilogram, and the olive branch and the leaves are made of gold. With a total weight of 118 grams, it is worth tens of thousands of euros.
